productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Boy's Kalkin White Brown Infant Kidswear
description: CompositionWhite round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with white ribbed neckline, raglan sleeves and graphic on the chest shorts: Dark khakhi dungarees with light brown check lining, two patch pockets on the back, two patch pockets on the front sides, two patch pockets on the front flap with embroidery and seal patch on the back flap FittingRegular  Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Bring out the happy sailor side in your little boy in this white tee and khakhi dungarees combo from gini and jony. The doodle of the puppy in the paper boat and add to the carefree sea loving spirit of this tee. Team this with the super comfy dungarees and crocs footwear for happy, casual outings with your little one, while the pure cotton fabric stays soft on his skin and keeps him fresh and comfortable all day.
